diagnostics.message: 5 distinct font weights in use: 500, 300, 600, 400, 700
diagnostics.fix: Most UIs need 3 weights (regular/medium/bold). Pick a small set and stick to it.

diagnostics.message: 4 distinct font families in use
diagnostics.fix: One sans + optionally one mono is plenty. Extra families make the UI feel chaotic.

diagnostics.message: 9 distinct z-index values in use: 0, 1, 2, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 9999
diagnostics.fix: Define a named z-scale (dropdown/sticky/modal/toast/tooltip) and reference it.

diagnostics.message: 25 distinct shadow definitions in use
diagnostics.fix: Most design systems have 3–5 elevation tokens. Consolidate.

diagnostics.message: Mixed px and rem in same file (2 px, 1 rem)
diagnostics.fix: Pick one of px or rem for spacing/sizing and stay consistent.

diagnostics.message: Inline style={{...}} with static properties (padding/color/etc.) — Tailwind class equivalents stay in the design system.
diagnostics.fix: Move padding/color/font-size/etc. to className. Reserve inline `style` for genuinely dynamic values (CSS variables, computed transforms).

diagnostics.message:
Button text "handleExample(ex.query)
                  className="rounde…" is 15 words.
diagnostics.fix: CTAs should be 1–4 words, verb-first, no period. "Save changes" not "Click here to save your changes."

diagnostics.message: "200 家交易企业  |   条交易关系  |  5 大行业星团" contains an HTML entity that should be a Unicode char in JSX.
diagnostics.fix: JSX renders text directly — write & not & in JSX text.

diagnostics.message: <label> has no htmlFor and doesn't wrap an input. The browser can't associate it with anything.
diagnostics.fix: Add `htmlFor="input-id"` or wrap the input inside the label.

diagnostics.message: <label> has no htmlFor and doesn't wrap an input. The browser can't associate it with anything.
diagnostics.fix: Add `htmlFor="input-id"` or wrap the input inside the label.

diagnostics.message: Icon button with p-1 around w-4 icon ≈ 24px — below the 44×44 minimum.
diagnostics.fix: Ensure padding + child size totals at least 44×44px (WCAG 2.5.5). Tailwind: `p-3` around `w-5 h-5` icons.

diagnostics.message: <h1> renders no static text. Either remove it or set aria-label, otherwise screen-reader users hit a void heading.
diagnostics.fix: Either give the heading text or remove it. Empty headings break document structure for screen readers.

diagnostics.message: <h2> renders no static text. Either remove it or set aria-label, otherwise screen-reader users hit a void heading.
diagnostics.fix: Either give the heading text or remove it. Empty headings break document structure for screen readers.

diagnostics.message: 1 list rendering without a .length empty-state branch.
diagnostics.fix: Render an empty state with copy and a next-step CTA, not a blank panel.

diagnostics.message: 2 list renderings without a .length empty-state branch.
diagnostics.fix: Render an empty state with copy and a next-step CTA, not a blank panel.

diagnostics.message: Badge's className is composed by string concat/template-literal. Use cn(...) (from @/lib/utils) so Tailwind merge resolves conflicts.
diagnostics.fix: Import { cn } from '@/lib/utils' (shadcn ships this) and pass space-separated args. Tailwind-merge resolves last-wins conflicts.

diagnostics.message: <Button variant="outline"> is overriding the variant with className="… border-white/15 …". Pick one source of truth.
diagnostics.fix: Pick one source of truth — extend the variant in the design system or drop variant=.
